accurate.why: All identified appropriations and provisions are accurately described and consistent with the bill text provided.

no_hallucinations.why: All claims traceable to the bill text; specific dollar figures and provisions match the text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as providing FY2025 legislative branch appropriations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendments to Energy Policy Act, child care center fund, cybersecurity requirements, and other provisions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Covers vehicle lease cap, waiver authority for telecom ban, and DEI training restrictions.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 applicability of various provisions.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers major appropriation recipients and key rider provisions including DEI, marriage definition, telecom ban, and COLA freeze.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and factual; lists provisions without advocacy.

coherent.why: Well-organized with clear structure separating appropriations from provisions.

concise.why: Comprehensive but appropriately detailed for a complex appropriations bill.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names House offices, committees, and relevant statutory references.

correct_figures.why: $1.93 billion for House salaries and $174,000 widow payment are accurate per the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
